scripts.dev:infra: docker compose --project-directory . -f deployment/docker-compose.yml up -d --wait && npm run seed
scripts.seed: docker exec hackathon-intelligence-notion-postgres-1 psql -U intelligence -d intelligence_app -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "INSERT INTO cpki.users (id, organization_id, created_at) VALUES ('default', 'casa-de-erlang', NOW()), ('1_default', 'casa-de-erlang', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;"
scripts.dev: npm run dev:infra && npx concurrently -k -n ui,bff,agent -c blue,cyan,green "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:infra && npx concurrently -k -n ui,bff,agent,mcp -c blue,cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:mcp"
scripts.dev:agent: cd apps/agent && uv run langgraph dev --port 8133
